events.title: CPI-U Monthly Acceleration: 1.34% MoM in 2022-03
events.short_summary: The CPI-U All Items index rose 1.34% month-over-month in 2022-03 (index level: 287.504). This represents a notable acceleration in consumer prices.
events.beginner_explanation: When consumer prices rise faster than expected, it signals persistent inflation.  Markets react negatively because the central bank may need to raise rates further.

events.title: Oil Price Spike: WTI rose ~40.5% to $15.22/bbl by 1986-10-21
events.short_summary: WTI crude rose approximately 40.5% over 60 trading days, reaching $15.22/bbl on 1986-10-21. (Base: $10.83/bbl.)
events.beginner_explanation: A sharp rise in oil prices increases costs for transportation, manufacturing, and heating.  This can hurt company profits and push consumer prices higher.

source_refs: date=2026-03-18, title=Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
events.title: FOMC Statement Released — 2026-03-18
events.short_summary: The Federal Reserve issued an FOMC statement on 2026-03-18. The statement signals the committee's current policy stance and forward guidance.
events.beginner_explanation: The FOMC statement tells markets whether the Fed plans to raise, lower, or hold interest rates.  Investors parse every word for clues about the economy's direction.

events.title: US Recession: 1902-09 to 1904-08
events.short_summary: NBER-dated US recession from September 1902 (1902Q4) to August 1904 (1904Q3) (23 months).
events.beginner_explanation: A recession means the economy shrank — businesses earned less and unemployment rose.  Stocks typically fall while bonds benefit from investors seeking safety.

source_refs: date=2007-08-09, title=BNP Paribas freezes three investment funds
events.title: BNP Paribas freezes three investment funds
events.short_summary: BNP Paribas freezes three investment funds. First major signal of subprime contagion in Europe (Source: NY Fed Financial Crisis Timeline)
events.beginner_explanation: This was a key moment during the 2007-2009 financial crisis.  Events like bank failures and emergency government actions shook confidence worldwide.

events.title: Northern Rock bank run
